expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Management",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task statuses so users can track whether work is pending, in progress, or done.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status schema",
      "description": "As a developer, I want to store a status value for each task so that they can be tracked.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Status column added to tasks table",
        "Allowed values are pending, in progress, done",
        "Existing tasks default to pending",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend action to update task status",
      "description": "As a user, I want the backend to support updating task statuses so that my changes are saved.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend action or endpoint added for updating task status",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show status badge on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want to see the current status of a task on its card so that I know its progress.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards display the current status as a badge",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add status control to task list",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change a task's status from the task list so that I can update it easily.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Status dropdown or control is visible on task rows in the list",
        "Changing the status updates the task using the backend action",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add status filter to task list",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so that I can focus on specific work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Filter control added to the task list view",
        "Filtering updates the list to show only tasks with the selected status",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover schema, backend status updates, badge display, status controls, and filtering.
